title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 487.160 - Laws relating to juvenile courts, include family court, when
text:
487.160.  Laws relating to juvenile courts, include family court, when. — Any reference in the statutory laws of this state to the juvenile division of the circuit court shall be deemed to include the family court when involving matters previously within the exclusive original jurisdiction of the juvenile division if such inclusion is not in conflict with the provisions of sections 487.010 to 487.190.
(L. 1993 H.B. 346 § 12)
